name: marketing-skills
tagline: ClawHub (115★): Access 23 marketing modules offering checklists, frameworks, and ready-to-use deliverables for CRO, SEO, copywriting, analy
verdict: Main weakness: the riskiest step — reading a specific module file that might not exist or match — has no fallback or stop-and-report instruction, so failures can go unhandled. It also never states what it's NOT for across 23 overlapping marketing topics, raising misfire risk, and skips versioning entirely.

highlights.summary: The riskiest step (reading a specific module file that may not exist or may not clearly match an ambiguous request) has no stated fallback, error message, or stop-and-report instru
No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body; with 23 broad, overlapping marketing topics, misfire against adjacent (e.g. general product/busine
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
